steps.assistant_text: Composite 'int + Y reader at dst+0x10' template. First jal = int reader; second jal = local reader (int/float/Quad4).

metadata.rom_truth_fix_2026_06_10: intra-USO calls retargeted to fn-4 leading-nop true entries via undefined_syms absolutes (h2h_4DC precedent); previous final_source called the splat-named entries, emitting jal fn where base ROM has jal fn-4.
